title: Fen's Simple Kits
description: Simple Kits is a lightweight and user-friendly mod that adds a fully-featured kit system to your Forge server. This mod is designed for server administrators and players who want a simple yet powerful tool for managing item sets.
body:
# Simple Kits - Intuitive Kit System for Your Forge Server

**Simple Kits** is a lightweight and user-friendly mod that adds a fully-featured kit system to your Forge 1.20.1 server. It is designed for server administrators and players who want a simple yet powerful tool for managing item sets, with permission-based access out of the box.

## **Key Features**

*   Easy Kit Creation - Place items in your inventory and use one command to create kits
*   Customizable Cooldowns - Set and adjust cooldown timers for each kit
*   Admin Controls - Create, edit, and delete kits with simple commands
*   Player-Friendly - Intuitive commands for players to claim kits
*   Permission-Based Access - Per-kit permissions via FTB Ranks or LuckPerms
*   Multi-language Support - Includes English and Russian localizations (you can add more)
*   Server-side Mod - Works entirely server-side, no client install required

## **Commands**

*   `/fkit <name>` - Receive a kit (requires permission)
*   `/fkit create <name> <cooldown>` - Create a new kit with items from your inventory (admin only)
*   `/fkit delete <name>` - Delete an existing kit (admin only)
*   `/fkit cooldown <name> <cooldown>` - Change a kit's cooldown time (admin only)
*   `/fkit list` - View kits you have access to and their cooldowns

## **Permissions and Rank Integration**

Simple Kits uses per-kit permission nodes:

*   `simplekits.kit.<kitname>` - Allow a specific kit
*   `simplekits.kit.*` - Allow all kits

Kit names in permissions are always lower-case (for example, kit `Starter` becomes `simplekits.kit.starter`).

Admin commands (`create`, `delete`, `cooldown`) require permission level 2 (OP).  
If no permission mod is installed, only operators can claim kits.

### **FTB Ranks (ranks.snbt)**

```
[player]
power: 0
default: true
permissions:
  - "simplekits.kit.starter"

[vip]
power: 0
permissions:
  - "simplekits.kit.starter"
  - "simplekits.kit.vip"

[admin]
power: 2
permissions:
  - "simplekits.kit.*"
```

### **LuckPerms**

```
/lp group default permission set simplekits.kit.starter true
/lp group vip permission set simplekits.kit.vip true
/lp group admin permission set simplekits.kit.* true
```

## **Why Simple Kits?**

Simple Kits was designed with simplicity and effectiveness in mind. Whether you are running a survival server that needs starter kits, a minigame server requiring class loadouts, or an RPG server with profession gear, Simple Kits provides a clean solution without unnecessary complexity.

Kit data is stored in JSON for easy backup and transfer, and cooldowns are tracked per player to keep gameplay fair while giving administrators full control.

Lightweight, optimized, and designed for real server environments - Simple Kits is a reliable choice for kit management on Forge.
